name: example-model
description: An example ScripTron model provider template.
author: Your Name

args_schema.name: prompt
args_schema.description: Prompt to send to the model.

examples: example-model --prompt "What is the capital of France?" --temperature 0.7

name: qwen-code
description: Alibaba Qwen (通义千问) Code model provider with graphical OAuth login support.
author: ScripTron

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: 'login' for OAuth authentication, 'chat' for model inference.

args_schema.name: prompt
args_schema.description: Prompt to send to the model (only required if action is 'chat').

args_schema.description: Action to perform: 'login' for OAuth authentication, 'chat' for model inference.

args_schema.name: prompt
args_schema.description: Prompt to send to the model (only required if action is 'chat').
